creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Long story short, I tried to run "make buildkernel" with gcc{48,49,5} and it failed due to missing "-fformat-extensions" support in the compiler (a feature which is present in base). I added a check to kern.mk to only use -fformat-extensions with the base version of gcc in r302403, but that unfortunately tripped a failure threshold with gcc, which prompted me to back out the change in r302438.

-fformat-extensions should be added to all of our compilers for consistency.
